name: Fidelity National Financial, Inc.
summary: Introductory Note The following describes the business of Fidelity National Financial, Inc. and its subsidiaries. Except where otherwise noted, all references to " we, " " us, " " our " , the " Company " or " FNF " are to Fidelity National Financial, Inc. and its subsidiaries, taken together.
